use_cases: User authentication menu showing account options and user profile in SaaS applications
Navigation hub for accessing dashboard, settings, and team spaces from any page
Account management interface for switching workspaces or managing preferences
ai_summary: A user account dropdown menu component built with Radix UI primitives featuring a clean, minimalist design with icon-labeled navigation items. The menu provides access to dashboard, team space, and settings with hover states and keyboard navigation support. Designed for SaaS and web applications requiring centralized account navigation with a professional, enterprise-ready appearance.
